description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.

subcriteria.name: change_approval_workflow
subcriteria.reference_text: Pull requests require at least one peer review and approval before merging to main or production branch. Branch protection rules enabled in GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket preventing direct pushes to main. Required reviewers configured. CODEOWNERS file defines approval requirements by file path.

subcriteria.name: cicd_testing
subcriteria.reference_text: CI/CD pipeline runs automated tests, linting, and security scans before deployment. GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Jenkins, or GitLab CI configured to block merges on test failure. Staging environment used for pre-production testing. Deployments are automated and repeatable.

subcriteria.name: change_tracking
subcriteria.reference_text: All changes tracked in version control with commit history, PR descriptions, and linked Jira tickets. Change log or release notes maintained. Emergency changes follow expedited approval process with retroactive review. Rollback procedures documented.

subcriteria.name: environment_separation
subcriteria.reference_text: Separate development, staging, and production environments. Developers do not have direct access to deploy to production. Production deployments require approval from release manager or automated pipeline gates. Infrastructure changes reviewed before apply.

mismatch_signals.reason: Physical access controls are not change management evidence.
User access lifecycle is CC6.x, not change management.
